title: L_Ender's Cataclysm X Terraria Calamity Music
description: Resource Pack that replaces the boss themes of the bosses from L_Ender's Cataclysm with songs from the Terraria Calamity mod.
body:
This is a resource pack that replaces the music of the bosses from the [L_Ender's Cataclysm mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm) with music from the Terraria Calamity mod.

**Currently replaces:**
- Netherite Monstrosity- Unholy Insurgency
- Ender Guardian- Interstellar Stomper
- Ignis- Raw, Unfiltered Calamity
- Harbinger- Fly of Beelzebub
- Leviathan- Threats of the Ocean Floor
- Ancient Remnant-Return to Slime
- Maldictus- Murderswarm

**Credit to the following:**
- L_Ender for the Cataclysm mod
- DM Dokuro for the music

**I do not own anything in this resource pack. If either author request to have this resource pack taken down for any reason, I will do such.**
